Container.Name: MOSS-TTS-Nano-API
Container.Overview: OpenAI-compatible TTS API powered by MOSS-TTS-Nano (100M params, Fudan OpenMOSS). 20 languages, 48kHz stereo, voice cloning, CPU-capable. Ultra-lightweight — can run alongside other GPU services without conflict. First start downloads model from HuggingFace. China users: set HF_ENDPOINT to https://hf-mirror.com for faster downloads. Works with or without GPU.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible TTS API port. Swagger docs at /docs

Config.Name: Model Cache
Config.Description: Model download cache. Persists across container recreates.

Config.Name: Device
Config.Description: Compute device: auto (GPU if available, else CPU), cuda:0, or cpu.

Config.Name: Default Voice
Config.Description: Default voice preset when none specified. Options: zh_1-zh_6, en_1-en_5, jp_1-jp_5, etc.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Endpoint
Config.Description: HuggingFace download endpoint. China users: change to https://hf-mirror.com for faster downloads.
